$script = @'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path(r"c:\Users\Er.Aman\OneDrive\Documents\PlaywrightFramwork\tests\HooksExection.spec.ts")

p = Path(r'c:\Users\Er.Aman\OneDrive\Documents\PlaywrightFramwork\tests\HooksExection.spec.ts')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
text = text.replace('await expect(page.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: /leave/i })).toBeVisible();', 'expect(await page.locator(\"//span[text=\'Leave\']\")).toBeDisabled();')
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')

tasks.label: update leave assertion in spec
args:
from pathlib import Path
p = Path(r'c:/Users/Er.Aman/OneDrive/Documents/PlaywrightFramwork/tests/HooksExection.spec.ts')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
old = 'await expect(page.getByRole("heading", { name: "Leave" })).toBeVisible();'
new = 'expect(await page.locator("//span[text=\'Leave\']")).toBeDisabled();'
if old not in text:
    raise SystemExit('target text not found')
text = text.replace(old, new)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')

tasks.label: edit leave assertion via batch
args: mkdir C:\temp 2>nul & echo @echo off > C:\temp\edit_leave.bat & echo powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "^$path='c:\Users\Er.Aman\OneDrive\Documents\PlaywrightFramwork\tests\HooksExection.spec.ts'; ^$text=(Get-Content ^$path -Raw); ^$old='await expect(page.getByRole(^"heading^", { name: ^"Leave^" })).toBeVisible();'; ^$new='expect(await page.locator(^"//span[text=''Leave'']^" )).toBeDisabled();'; ^$text=^$text.Replace(^$old, ^$new); Set-Content -Path ^$path -Value ^$text -Encoding utf8" >> C:\temp\edit_leave.bat & C:\temp\edit_leave.bat

args: const fs=require('fs'); const p='c:/Users/Er.Aman/OneDrive/Documents/PlaywrightFramwork/tests/HooksExection.spec.ts'; let text=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const old='await expect(page.getByRole("heading", { name: "Leave" })).toBeVisible();'; const neu='expect(await page.locator("//span[text=\'Leave\']")).toBeDisabled();'; if(!text.includes(old)) throw new Error('target text not found'); text=text.replace(old, neu); fs.writeFileSync(p, text, 'utf8');
